title: 6pcs children's stress relief balls, rainbow stress relief balls, squeeze balls mesh grape balls fidget squeeze toys suitable for ADHD OCD autism to improve concentration stress relief balls (5CM)
features: [6-Pack Stress Balls]: Looking for a great stress-relieving toy for you or your child? Try this new sensory stress ball set. This brightly colored sensory toy offers a delightful tactile and visual experience. Squeeze it to reveal a vibrant rainbow effect, revealing a variety of vibrant colors.

[Stress and Anxiety Relief]: Stress balls are suitable for children and adults, especially those with Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADD/ADHD), Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder (OCD), autism, or high anxiety. Squeezing also helps stimulate muscles and tendons, relieving pain caused by carpal tunnel syndrome.

[Soft and Comfortable]: Made of eco-friendly, non-toxic TPU (5cm and 6cm diameter), these soft balls are reusable, washable, and tear-resistant. The smooth surface ensures a comfortable squeeze, while the non-slip handle prevents slipping.

[Lightweight and Portable]: Compact and lightweight, it's gentle on your hands and can be slipped into your bag to strengthen your hands and relieve stress. Take it with you anywhere. Share it with siblings, friends, or colleagues at the office. Enjoy a sense of calm and relaxation anytime, anywhere.

[Great Gift] This stress relief gift pack is perfect for everyone, including adults and teens. It provides a fun and relaxing way for them to unwind. It's perfect as party bag fillers, birthday gifts, Christmas stocking stuffers, and classroom prizes. They also make great classroom prizes, party favors, Easter basket fillers, and birthday gifts.
description: Product description Our mesh stress balls come in a variety of vibrant colors. These balls are made from soft rubber and can easily fit into your pocket or bag. Use them to strengthen your hand muscles and relieve hand fatigue. Perfect for those who work at a desk or are looking for stress relief tools! Name: Rainbow Squeeze Ball. Material: Soft rubber. Color: Multicolor. Product size: Approximately 5 cm, 6 cm. Packaging list: Mesh stress balls *6.
